message:
fix(browser): import abiMetadata from browser-core root export instead of JSON sidecar

The previous import path (@asupersync/browser-core/abi-metadata.json)
relies on Node ESM resolving a deep JSON import from a package, which
fails under strict module resolution and some bundler configurations.
Switching to the named re-export from the package root
(@asupersync/browser-core) uses the standard entry point and works
across all resolution strategies.

Contract tests updated to enforce this boundary: wasm_js_exports checks
for the named import form, and a new test in
wasm_service_worker_broker_contract verifies the sidecar path is absent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
